title: Grok 5 — The Biggest AI News Is Here (Musk’s AGI Bet)
summary: YouTube video analyzing Grok 5 rumors with credibility ratings, discussing xAI's Colossus 2 infrastructure (500,000 GPUs, 1 gigawatt), comparing Grok 5 against competitors like Claude and GPT-5, and evaluating Musk's claim that it is indistinguishable from AGI. The video covers leaked capabilities, pricing expectations, and delayed Q1 launch timeline.
